content: vercel.json headers for CRA: hashed /static/** assets Cache-Control public,max-age=31536000,immutable; index.html must be no-cache/no-store or users get stale HTML referencing deleted chunks (ChunkLoadError after deploys). CDN-Cache-Control overrides Cache-Control for Vercel cache. legacy routes key cannot coexist with headers/rewrites keys in vercel.json.
